OmniUiCard.dataSourceConfig:
{"dataSource":{"type":"Query","value":{"dsDelay":"","query":"SELECT Id, Customer_Name__c, Vehicle_Model__r.Name,
 Test_Drive_Date_Time__c, Drive_Type__c,
 Booking_Channel__c, Status__c
FROM Test_Drive__c
WHERE Assigned_Dealership__c = '{recordId}'
 AND Status__c = 'Scheduled'
ORDER BY Test_Drive_Date_Time__c ASC","jsonMap":"{"recordId":"{recordId}"}"},"orderBy":{"name":"","isReverse":""},"contextVariables":[{"name":"recordId","val":"001bm00001iMVjGAAW","id":0}]}}
OmniUiCard.name: FC_DealerBookingCard
